provider_source.source_of_truth_boundary: AOF export summarizes local runtime evidence, not raw provider transcript truth.

event_summaries.summary: Heartbeat required next release completion using AOF runtime.
v9.6 was selected as the next provider track release because cost/quota boundaries are the next risk after incident recovery evidence.
AOF runtime opened TASK-116 and wrote provider cost/quota boundary evidence.
v9.6 cost/quota docs, schemas, commands, capability matrix, and release evidence were generated.
Cost/quota audit, capability audit, product value audit, release-state audit, and tests are release evidence.
Actual provider billing correctness remains not proven; v9.6 only creates pre-execution cost/quota governance evidence.
Stop if execution can advance without budget owner, cost ceiling, quota, rate-limit, billing, or overage policy evidence.

risk_candidates: Cost/quota boundary could be read as production billing proof if not-proven wording is weak.
decision_candidates: Keep v9.6 as pre-execution cost/quota governance and defer production billing proof.

redaction_boundary: No secrets, credentials, provider payload bodies, or billing data are exported.
release_ready_boundary: Release readiness is bounded to structural/runtime cost/quota evidence and tests.
not_proven: Session export does not prove actual provider billing correctness, provider output correctness, or market adoption.
